buttonSub: Support the earthquake response in Venezuela
orgDescription: The VACC Foundation (Venezuelan American Chamber of Commerce) is a non-profit organization based in Coral Gables, Florida, dedicated to strengthening the Venezuelan community. Through this campaign it channels donations to support the earthquake response in Venezuela; your contribution helps bring assistance to those affected.
transparency1: Payment is processed securely with Stripe; your card details never pass through this site.
transparency2: The VACC has operated since 1991 in Miami and its IRS financial filings (Form 990) are publicly available, so you can verify where the money goes.
transparency3: It is a 501(c)(6) non-profit; in the U.S. donations are not tax-deductible.
